name: Candied Blossoms
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash the blossoms and petals gently, then spread them on flat plates to dry.
2 Combine the sugar and water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil over high heat until it reaches 230-234°F (112-114°C) on a candy thermometer.
3 Pour the syrup into a bowl and place the bowl on a bed of crushed ice.
4 When the syrup begins to crystallize, hold each blossom with tweezers and dip one at a time into the syrup. Place the petals on waxed paper to dry.
5 As the petals harden, dust them with confectioners' sugar.
